# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd authz missing.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  port: 8080
  service: my-service
  protocol: http

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-service-server-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: my-service-server
  allowedServices:
    - name: service-a
      namespace: my-namespace
      port: 8080
    - name: service-b
      namespace: my-namespace
      port: 8080
  deniedServices:
    - name: service-c
      namespace: my-namespace

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  port: 8081
  service: service-a
  protocol: http

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-server-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-a-server
  allowedServices:
    - name: my-service
      namespace: my-namespace
      port: 8080
  deniedServices:
    - name: service-b
      namespace: my-namespace

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  port: 8082
  service: service-b
  protocol: http

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-server-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-b-server
  allowedServices:
    - name: my-service
      namespace: my-namespace
      port: 8080
    - name: service-a
      namespace: my-namespace
      port: 8081
  deniedServices:
    - name: service-c
      namespace: my-namespace

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-c-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  port: 8083
  service: service-c
  protocol: http

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-c-server-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-c-server
  allowedServices:
    - name: service-a
      namespace: my-namespace
      port: 8081
  deniedServices:
    - name: my-service
      namespace: my-namespace
    - name: service-b
      namespace: my-namespace
